untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of strategy profitability (rolling profit, Sharpe ratio, competitive entry erosion) which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. The signal monitors meta-strategy performance metrics relative to market competition and baseline profitability thresholds—concepts that require portfolio-level P&L tracking and risk-adjusted return calculations outside the scope of single-instrument technical analysis. Additionally, all numeric thresholds are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] with no concrete values provided.
translation_notes: This is a regime/meta-strategy monitoring rule rather than a technical trading signal. It describes an exit discipline based on strategy performance degradation (profit erosion below sustainable levels) and risk-adjusted returns (Sharpe ratio decline), which are portfolio metrics not derivable from open/high/low/close/volume data alone. The signal requires external P&L calculation, competitive analysis, and baseline statistical thresholds that fall outside the backtesting engine's allowed indicator set.
